summary: Tested Roblox Arabic marketplace end-to-end. Backend: 19/19 pytest tests pass (health, products CRUD, bank info, orders, trades flow with 2 guest sessions, admin login). Frontend: store loads with 4 seeded products, RTL Arabic + IBM Plex/Readex fonts active, search filters cards, auth modal + guest login + logout works, product detail renders bank info + order form fields, trades create-tab opens product picker and fills slots, admin login with correct credentials shows products/orders/bank/trades tabs, wrong admin password is rejected. IMPORTANT: Had to patch /app/frontend/craco.config.js because react-scripts 5.0.1 ships deprecated onBeforeSetupMiddleware/onAfterSetupMiddleware/https devServer options that webpack-dev-server 5.2.4 rejects — frontend supervisor was crash-looping (502 Bad Gateway) before the fix.

minor.issue: Cookie session_token takes precedence over Authorization Bearer header (token = session_token; if not token and authorization...). In practice this is fine because the React app sends Bearer + no cookie on the same origin, but if anyone ever has a stale cookie it would override Bearer.

issues: Wrong-password feedback is not surfaced via a .error/[class*=error] DOM node; user only sees that the form stays on screen. Consider rendering a visible Arabic error message (e.g. 'بيانات الأدمن خاطئة').

infrastructure.issue: react-scripts 5.0.1 + webpack-dev-server 5.2.4 incompatibility crashed the dev server (onAfterSetupMiddleware / onBeforeSetupMiddleware / https are no longer valid). Patched in craco.devServer override to translate the deprecated options. Frontend now compiles and serves HTTP 200.

action_items: Review the craco.config.js patch I added (or pin webpack-dev-server to v4 in package.json resolutions) so the dev server keeps starting reliably across rebuilds.
Render a visible Arabic error message under the admin login form (currently a silent rejection on wrong password).
Optional: prefer Authorization Bearer over cookie inside get_current_user so a stale cookie can't shadow an explicit Bearer token.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI on_event('startup'/'shutdown') — works on current FastAPI but should migrate to lifespan handlers.
create_session token format f'sess_{uuid}_{uuid}' is fine, but consider httponly+secure cookie only over https; samesite='none' requires secure which is set — OK.
Admin JWT secret is read from .env at import time and admin JWT is signed HS256 — good. No refresh/rotation, 7-day expiry is acceptable for an MVP.
Trade slot validation pads to 9 and requires >=1 product on each side — correct per spec.
Frontend AdminPage.jsx has a useEffect missing dep 'refresh' warning — non-blocking but worth fixing.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on tested flows (store, auth, product detail, trades create, admin login, logout)

test_credentials: Admin yusefemad1430@gmail.com / Ahmad1207 (verified working). Guest sessions created via POST /api/auth/guest with arbitrary name. Phone auth tested with random +9665xxxxxxxx.
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds 4 products (Shadow Dragon, Frost Dragon, Giant Pumpkin, Brainrot Hacker) and default bank_info on startup. Test created a TEST_Product_X (deleted), one TEST_Bank (restored to default), one order (deleted), three trades (matched/deleted).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py runs in ~5s and covers all required flows. Frontend UI works on https://sharp-pare-13.preview.emergentagent.com. Be aware: get_current_user prefers cookie over Bearer, so when reusing a requests.Session for two different guest tokens you must use a fresh `requests` call (or session.cookies.clear()) for the Bearer to win — already handled in test_trades_flow.
rca of the issue: Frontend 502: react-scripts 5.0.1 generates a webpack-dev-server v4-shaped config object (onBeforeSetupMiddleware, onAfterSetupMiddleware, https: true), but the project pins webpack-dev-server 5.2.4 which removed those keys and now validates via schema. WDS threw 'Invalid options object' and craco exited, supervisor kept restarting. Mitigation: added a craco devServer hook that strips/translates those keys (https -> server: {type:'https'}, onAfter/Before -> setupMiddlewares wrapper). Frontend now compiles with only a benign eslint warning.
